meta.description: CAS verification coverage for core-data/formulas.json. formulas.json is generated by workflows/consolidate.py from fragments — do NOT hand-edit it. This file records verification status separately.

resolved_blocker.description: BLOCKER: denominator in formulas.json is 4, but published formula and CAS verification give denominator 2. f0(d) = Gamma(d+1)*Gamma(d/2) / (2*Gamma(3d/2)), NOT /4. At d=2: correct gives 1/2, incorrect gives 1/4. At d=4: correct gives 1/10, incorrect gives 1/20. The KR ordering fraction d_MM~2.38 is only reproduced with denominator 2. Fix: change denominator 4 -> 2 in the causal-sets fragment (myrheim-meyer latex field).
resolved_blocker.resolution: Fixed post-kolo-20: causal-sets fragment latex denominator 4->2 + consolidate; WL script reads live formulas.json denominator; CAS lane overall_pass=True (7/7 scripts). Also added the missing overall_pass field to causal-set-combinatorial-operators.wl.

The WL script now reads the live formulas.json denominator dynamically; f0(2)=1/2, f0(4)=1/10, d_MM~2.38 all confirmed. Source: meyer-1988.
